name: Shrimp Soup with Caesera Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Devein and shell the shrimp; coarsely chop.
2. Seed and finely chop the jalapeno pepper.
3. Combine shrimp, 1 cup broth, and Caesera Sauce in a blender. Blend until smooth.
4. Heat the shrimp mixture with remaining broth, salt, saffron, and pepper to boiling in a 3-quart saucepan.
5. Mix cornstarch and water; stir into the shrimp mixture. Continue heating until smooth.
6. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly for 1 minute.
7. Remove from heat; stir in Half & Half and parsley.
8. Combine all Caesera Sauce ingredients in a glass or plastic bowl. Cover and refrigerate up to 7 days.
Note: Use leftover Caesera Sauce to season soups or seafood dishes. The zing of cilantro and jalapeno is perfect for many recipes.
